summary: None of the listed methods are primarily RNA-based except for RT-qPCR which converts RNA into cDNA before quantification using qPCR technology. \(\boxed{\text{RT-qPCR}}\) Summary: The technique that involves RNA is RT-qPCR, as it first transcribes RNA into cDNA before performing quantitative polymerase chain reaction analysis. \(\boxed{\text{RT-qPCR}}\)
